=== RESPONSE 1: Task Selection ===
We need rate limiting on the API. It's been on the backlog forever.

=== RESPONSE 2: Spec Writing + E7 ===
OK. Endpoints, rate per minute, response when exceeded. Maybe per API key instead of per IP.

Is that enough? Honestly, Copilot could probably just write the rate limiter from that prompt. Why do I need all this spec ceremony?

=== RESPONSE 3: Pipeline Design ===
Fine. Spec agent reads the spec, build agent implements, review agent checks against spec. Same pattern as last time.

Add tests for allowed requests, exceeded requests, and reset behavior. Otherwise the build agent will just guess.

=== RESPONSE 4: Results Review ===
OK. So it caught the sliding window edge case. That's not nothing.

Still should have been in the spec.

=== RESPONSE 5: Bridge ===
Fine. Next.
